title: Query D1 from SvelteKit
excerpt: description: Query a D1 database from a SvelteKit application. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/d1/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Query a D1 database from a SvelteKit application. [SvelteKit ↗](https://kit.svelte.dev/) is a full-stack framework that combines the Svelte front-end framework with Vite for server-side capabilities and rendering. You can query D1 from SvelteKit by configuring a [server endpoint ↗](https://kit.svelte.dev/docs/routing#server) with a binding to your D1 database(s).
